Program Objectives

In Turkey and in the world, with hardware and software solutions to develop knowledge and skills, qualified technical staff is a fact that always needs.

Computer Programming Associate Degree Program is capable of transforming theory into practice, minimizing the adaptation time between education and business world, assimilating team work, dealing with complex technology and adapting to different computer environments It aims.

In their two-year trainings, students will be able to determine the procedures required to solve a software project with the help of a computer, to determine the order of implementation, to write commands corresponding to the operations in a specific programming language, to check if the program works in accordance with its purpose; design, process and function planning, problem solving and solution development, decision-making, management, with the creative equipment in the fields of highly educated individuals are put into life.

In addition, our students participate in a 30-day workplace practice training and reinforce their theoretical knowledge with practical experiences and meet them in the future with their work fields and people.

Vertical Transfer Opportunities

According to the DGS (Dikey Geçiş Sınavı / Vertical Transfer Exam) result, they can switch over to the 4 year sections related to their field.
